items.topic_thesis: To found trust without building a cult, leaders must transgress, recognize, release, and submit.
items.angle: Do not summarize the news; diagnose the pattern underneath it.
items.hook: Most people are misreading what this story is actually about. to found trust without building a cult, leaders must transgress, recognize, release, and submit.

items.topic_thesis: Planning tools are communication tools when they make uncertainty socially admissible before the fact.
items.angle: Make the pattern recognizable fast and show what drives it.
items.hook: You can tell a team is drifting into theater when planning tools are communication tools when they make uncertainty socially admissible before the fact.

items.topic_thesis: Li can be designed, but Ren has to be generated.
items.angle: Name the concept, explain it plainly, and show why it matters now.
items.hook: The mistake leaders keep making is thinking li can be designed, but ren has to be generated.

items.topic_thesis: Autophagic growth means healthy organizations learn to eat their own decay.
items.angle: The interpretation is the point, not the quote itself.
items.hook: A note landed in my inbox that names a pattern I keep seeing. autophagic growth means healthy organizations learn to eat their own decay.

items.angle: The old source is not the point; present relevance is.
items.hook: An old idea becomes useful again when the present gets confusing. moderate growth.
